untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition (Cup with Handle, Inverted) cannot be expressed using only price action and technical indicators. The conditions 'short in duration', 'narrow in width', and 'avoid short and wide' require pattern detection logic not available in the indicator set. Implemented proxy conditions using ATR volatility and body size as a best approximation, but true pattern identification requires candlestick pattern recognition beyond allowed operators.
translation_notes: Attempted to proxy pattern characteristics: 'narrow' approximated as low ATR relative to baseline, 'short duration' set to 21-day max hold based on source table. Entry conditions use ATR and body size as volatility/width proxies. Exit on close above SMA_20 as reversal signal. Success rates and detailed performance metrics from source stored in parameters but not directly translatable to entry/exit logic.
